vllm.title: [ROCm] Fixes for GPTQ on ROCm
vllm.author: kliuae
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some minor fixes are applied to support GPTQ on ROCm. Tested with ROCm 5.7 environments and the Dockerfile.rocm can be built.
Loading of safetensors load format is enabled for ROCm as quite a few GPTQ models come with such weights.
The amd-installation doc is also updated to include hipBLAS as a pre

vllm.title: Update Help Text for --gpu-memory-utilization Argument
vllm.author: SuhongMoon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Updated help text for the --gpu-memory-utilization argument in our command-line parser to make it consistent with the vllm documentation.

vllm.title: [Minor] Add warning on CUDA graph memory usage
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR informs users that using CUDA graphs may lead to OOM, and it provides a solution to this.
